input: WITH RECURSIVE reachable(id, depth) AS (SELECT 'doc_ry4ljv' as id, 0 as depth UNION ALL SELECT t.__id, r.depth + 1 FROM reachable r INNER JOIN edges e ON e.source_id = (SELECT __global_id FROM objects WHERE __id = r.id AND __workspace = 'ws2') INNER JOIN objects t ON e.target_id = t.__global_id WHERE r.depth < 3 AND e.__workspace = 'ws2' AND t.__workspace = 'ws2') SELECT id, depth FROM reachable ORDER BY depth, id
expected: WITH RECURSIVE reachable (id, depth) AS (SELECT 'doc_ry4ljv' AS id, 0 AS depth UNION ALL SELECT t.__id, r.depth + 1 FROM reachable r INNER JOIN edges e ON e.source_id = (SELECT __global_id FROM objects WHERE __id = r.id AND __workspace = 'ws2') AND e.__workspace = 'ws2' INNER JOIN objects t ON e.target_id = t.__global_id AND t.__workspace = 'ws2' WHERE r.depth < 3 AND e.__workspace = 'ws2' AND t.__workspace = 'ws2') SELECT id, depth FROM reachable ORDER BY depth ASC, id ASC
